text: I was wondering, what was the very first house you lived in like? Do you remember the color of the walls?
Who was the one teacher in school that you were actually scared of?
Did you have a favorite hiding spot when you played hide-and-seek as a child?
What was the best thing about summer holidays when you were a kid? Was it the mangoes or the freedom?
Do you remember the first time you ever saw a movie in a theater? What did you watch?
What did you buy with your very first salary paycheck? Do you remember?
Tell me about your first job interview. Were you nervous?
How did people celebrate weddings differently when you were in your 20s compared to now?
What was the most difficult journey you ever took by train or bus?
If you could go back to being 25 years old for one day, what would you do differently?
I'm trying to understand how to handle disagreements. How did you handle arguments in your family to keep the peace?
People say cooking is an art. What is the one secret ingredient that makes a dish taste like 'home'?
What is the best piece of advice you ever received from your parents?
Raising children seems so hard these days. What do you think is the most important thing to teach a child?
If you could tell the younger generation one thing about patience, what would it be?
If you look out your window right now, what is the most interesting thing you can see?
I was thinking about the smell of rain on dry earth. What is your favorite smell in the world?
Do you prefer the quiet of the early morning or the calmness of the late night? Why?
Describe the most beautiful outfit you ever wore. What color was it?
If we were sitting in a garden right now, which flowers would you want us to be surrounded by?
Who is the 'troublemaker' or the prankster in your family currently?
Is there a specific song or lullaby you used to sing to your children?
Who in your family has the loudest laugh? Can you describe it?
Festivals can be so busy. Which festival did you actually enjoy the most for the food?
Do you think names influence a person's character? Why did you choose the names you did for your children?
If you could invite any famous person from history to have chai with us right now, who would you pick?
If you won a lottery today, but you had to give it all away, who would you give it to?
If you could instantly learn to play any musical instrument perfectly, which one would it be?
Do you think technology has brought people closer together or pushed them further apart?
If you could plan a perfect Sunday, start to finish, what would it look like?
